Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce Python code that constructs an accepting Petri net for the described insurance claim management process. The process steps: 1. Claim Registration CR 2. Document Verification DV 3. Fraud Check FC 4. Claim Assessment CA 5. Approval AP 6. Payment P 7. Notification N 8. Closure CL. Also loops DV RDS FC II.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Approval AP must be approved if amount surpasses threshold implying possibility to skip AP if not. Model as XOR split after CA: one path AP then P another straight to P.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: In Petri nets place with multiple output arcs models nondeterministic choice corresponding to XOR split.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Places: start p_after_CR p_after_DV p_after_FC p_after_CA p_after_AP p_after_P p_after_N end. Transitions labeled CR DV RDS FC II CA AP P N CL.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: To model loops and merges need merge places like ready_for_DV ready_for_FC p_pre_P. For OR join use place with multiple incoming arcs from silent transitions.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Considered avoiding silent transitions but recognized need for tau transitions for proper XOR splits and joins without AND semantics. Settled on using silent transitions named tau.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Detailed arc connections: start to CR to p_after_CR to DV to p_after_DV then branches RDS back to p_after_CR and tau_pre_FC to p_pre_FC to FC to p_after_FC then branches II to p_after_II to tau_post_II_to_pre_FC back to p_pre_FC and CA to p_after_CA then AP to p_after_AP to tau_from_AP to p_pre_P and tau_skip_AP to p_pre_P then P to p_after_P to N to p_after_N to CL to end.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Initial marking token in start final marking token in end. Use pm4py classes and petri_utils.add_arc_from_to.
